name: Tomato-Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tomato, cut into about 18 pieces (cut in half, then each half into thirds sideways and lengthwise)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped tomato, cucumber slices, onion slices, vinegar, sugar, water, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Cover the bowl and let the salad marinate for at least 1 hour before serving.
